merged_events.event_description: Embassy Manama was opened with John N. Gatch, Jr. as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, establishing the first U.S. diplomatic mission in Bahrain following independence.

evidence.quote: Embassy Manama was opened on September 21, 1971, with John N. Gatch, Jr. as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

merged_events.event_description: U.S. diplomatic presence established in Bahrain with a Chargé d'Affaires ad interim presenting credentials, marking the opening of the U.S. mission following Bahraini independence.

evidence.quote: John Newton Jr Gatch, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1971-09-21.

merged_events.event_description: U.S. Embassy in Bahrain elevated to full ambassadorial representation when the first Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary presented credentials.

evidence.quote: William A Stoltzfus, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1971-12-09. Credentials presented: 1972-02-17. Appointment terminated on 1974-06-09.

matched.notes: RDCR Event 0 matches exactly on date (1971-09-21) and status (Embassy). POCOM Event 1 refers to the same event (Gatch presenting credentials on the same date) but was labeled 'Interests' in extraction; RDCR is the primary source and explicitly states 'Embassy Manama was opened,' so Embassy is the correct status. No discrepancy.
